policy: Controlled feature intake. Build A and B first; keep C isolated until validated by trials.

A_trial_ready.why: Makes the product testable against repeatable intents.
Prevents exported artifacts from becoming loose JSON blobs.
Makes first run repeatable by humans and Nexus integrators.

B_nexus_integration.why: Defines the object Nexus can receive from Capability OS.
Defines how Nexus/runtime reports execution state, evidence and artifacts back.

C_labs_backlog.why: Useful after packs prove value across trials.
Too much UI surface before runtime bridge is validated.
Should wait until task packet semantics stabilize.
Org/team concepts belong after Nexus integration is proven.
Commercial layer should follow pilot usage.
